requirement_topic.en: Cell and battery pack safety basis
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯与电池组安全依据
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯與電池組安全依據

summary.en: For Rwanda entry, import files for lithium cells and power banks normally reference RS safety documentation and IEC-aligned test logic (RS/IEC family references). Practical evidence is expected on protection, abuse resistance, and failure behavior as part of PVoC and import compliance.
summary.zh: 在卢旺达放行场景下，锂电芯与移动电源通常以RS/IEC系列参考作为安全依据，PVoC与进口文件会关注过压、过流、短路、热行为等安全防护与失效表现证据。
summary.zht: 在盧旺達放行場景下，鋰電芯與行動電源通常以RS/IEC系列參考作為安全依據，PVoC與進口文件會關注過壓、過流、短路、熱行為等安全保護與失效表現證據。

standards_or_laws: RS-adopted IEC 62133-series requirements for portable rechargeable lithium cells and batteries
RSB safety documentation expectations for imported battery packs

summary.en: China applies GB 31241-2022 and related references such as GB/T 18287 for domestic battery safety. These are useful for design engineering but not a direct destination substitute for Rwanda entry conditions.
summary.zh: 中国国内以GB 31241-2022及GB/T 18287等作为安全依据，能支撑技术设计但不足以替代卢旺达目的地的PVoC和进口文件路径。
summary.zht: 中國國內以GB 31241-2022及GB/T 18287等作為安全依據，能支撐技術設計但不足以替代盧旺達目的地的PVoC和進口文件路徑。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries
GB/T 18287 family references for lithium battery technology

gap.en: The technical test baseline is not the same as the target-market paperwork model. Rwanda entry depends on RSB-aligned import documentation even when GB/GB-T safety testing already exists.
gap.zh: 技术测试基线与目标市场文件模型并不等同。即使已有GB/GB-T测试，卢旺达仍要求按RSB路径提交进口合规文件。
gap.zht: 技術測試基線與目標市場文件模型並不等同。即使已有GB/GB-T測試，盧旺達仍要求按RSB路徑提交進口合規文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory to provide safety-aligned technical evidence in the import-file package for regulated categories.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory in Chinese domestic market safety management for applicable categories, but not structured as Rwanda-style destination import conformity proof.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Use IEC/RS-aligned safety evidence for Rwanda filings and map each report to PVoC import obligations; Chinese GB tests help reduce technical risk but do not replace destination compliance packaging.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在卢旺达文件中应使用IEC/RS对齐的安全证据并逐型号映射到PVoC义务，GB测试有助于降低技术风险，但不能取代目的地合规文件化。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在盧旺達文件中應使用IEC/RS對齊的安全證據並逐型號映射到PVoC義務，GB測試有助降低技術風險，但不能取代目的地合規文件化。
